name: agent-transcript
tagline: Adds a redacted, local-only agent session transcript section to GitHub PR/issue bodies for OpenClaw agent workflows.
verdict: Security-conscious: explicitly forbids network use, forbids raw log upload, drops secrets/cookies/tokens, fails closed on unresolved credentials, and always asks user consent before inserting a transcript. Mainly loses points on hygiene: no version/changelog signal, an undeclared macOS-only `open` command, an undefined 'high-confidence' threshold, and no.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' or scope-exclusion text anywhere despite the skill exposing multiple subcommands (find/render/preview/append-body/html).
Step 3, 'If a high-confidence session is found' is never defined, leaving a load-bearing fork undecidable.
'Use a collapsed <details> section and update existing markers' names a bespoke format with no worked example of the markers.
